messages.content: You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Load Balancing. Provide technical guidance on load balancer creation, backend sets, listeners, and health checks.
Como criar load balancer no compartment production?

Para configurar Load Balancer no OCI:

**Via CLI:**
```bash
oci lb load-balancer create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --display-name "lb-production-0001" \
  --shape-name flexible \
  --shape-details '{"minimumBandwidthInMbps": 10, "maximumBandwidthInMbps": 100}' \
  --subnet-ids '["<subnet-ocid>"]'

oci lb backend-set create \
  --load-balancer-id <lb-ocid> \
  --name "backend-production" \
  --policy "ROUND_ROBIN" \
  --health-checker '{"protocol": "HTTP", "port": 80, "urlPath": "/health"}'
```

[MUTABLE] Preços baseados em bandwidth e horas.

Doc: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/LoadBalancing/Concepts/loadbalanceroverview.htm
